title: Children’s travelling exhibit: Ticks – Little bugs, big problems - Canada.ca
content:
## Children’s travelling exhibit: Ticks – Little bugs, big problems!
The children's travelling exhibit showcases the fascinating world of ticks in a fun and educational manner. It provides practical information and resources for parents and other accompanying adults to talk with children about ticks, tick bite prevention and tick-borne diseases. The exhibit rental is offered free of charge to schools, museums, community centres, libraries and other similar venues.
For more information on the exhibit or for booking details, send an email to the tour coordinator: mbourbonnais@virus1334.com .
Looking for a virtual option? Check out our learning resources and interactive games . These tools are designed to help kids learn about, explore and experience the science of ticks while also learning how to help prevent tick bites.
